title: tsuga chinensis subsp. wardii
intro: Tsuga chinensis subsp. wardii, also known as Ward's hemlock spruce or Chinese hemlock, is a coniferous tree species native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Tsuga chinensis subsp. wardii include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving circulation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
